name: Text to speech · Hugging Face
snippet: Text-to-speech (TTS) is the task of creating natural-sounding speech from text, where the speech can be generated in multiple languages and for multiple speakers. Several text-to-speech models are currently available in 🤗 Transformers, such as Dia, CSM, Bark, MMS, VITS and SpeechT5.
